case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS RODRIGUEZ CARDIDAD

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ CARDIDAD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-21-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04
